constraints.name: warnOverdue
constraints.messageTemplate: Facility work order '{title}' is past scheduled date

value.value: Only an active facility can be sent to maintenance
Only an active area can be closed for maintenance
Only an operational asset can be sent to maintenance

constraints.name: warnRetireOperational
constraints.messageTemplate: Retiring operational asset '{assetName}' — verify no active assignments

value.value: Can only edit a scheduled (not yet started) schedule
Can only start a scheduled item
Only an in-progress schedule can be completed
Work order must be open to assign
Work order must be open or assigned to start
Work order must be in progress to complete
Cannot cancel a completed or already cancelled work order
